title: Quality Gate Insights
description: Gate pass/fail rates, common failures, security findings

panels.title: Gate Pass/Fail Rates
panels.query: SELECT operation_name as gate, SUM(CASE WHEN attributes_string['gate.status'] = 'pass' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as passed, SUM(CASE WHEN attributes_string['gate.status'] = 'fail' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name LIKE 'gates.gate_%' AND _timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 DAYS' GROUP BY gate

panels.title: Average Gate Duration (ms)
panels.query: SELECT operation_name as gate, ROUND(AVG(CAST(attributes_int64['gate.duration_ms'] AS DOUBLE)), 0) as avg_ms FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name LIKE 'gates.gate_%' AND _timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 DAYS' GROUP BY gate ORDER BY avg_ms DESC

panels.title: Security Findings by CWE
panels.query: SELECT attributes_string['security.cwe_ids'] as cwe, COUNT(*) as count FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name = 'gates.gate_3_security' AND attributes_string['security.cwe_ids'] IS NOT NULL AND _timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' GROUP BY cwe ORDER BY count DESC

panels.title: Secret Scanner Catches
panels.query: SELECT SUM(CAST(attributes_int64['gate.findings_count'] AS INT)) as total_findings FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name = 'gates.gate_2_secrets' AND attributes_string['gate.status'] = 'fail' AND _timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS'

panels.title: Gate Failures Over Time
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', _timestamp) as day, operation_name as gate, COUNT(*) as failures FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name LIKE 'gates.gate_%' AND attributes_string['gate.status'] = 'fail' AND _timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' GROUP BY day, gate ORDER BY day
